summary: Tested two new POS features: 1) Account naming on ALL tables via 'Editar Nombre' button in 'Funciones de Mesa' modal, 2) Enhanced comanda headers with area/table/account/waiter/date info. Both features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle/Description for accessibility - minor accessibility improvement needed

tests.name: Editar Nombre button exists in Funciones de Mesa modal
pre-check endpoint includes area and account info
tests.details: HTML contains ÁREA: {area_name} and account label

editar_nombre_button.details: Button visible in 'Funciones de Mesa' modal, triggers openRenameAccountDialog event

rename_account_dialog.details: Dialog opens with input field, saves label via PUT /api/orders/{id}/label

enhanced_comanda_headers.details: Comandas include area_name, account_display, account_label, waiter_name, date

enhanced_pre_check.details: Pre-cuenta includes ÁREA line and account label in header

enhanced_cancel_ticket.details: Cancel tickets include same enhanced header fields

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Dialog components missing DialogTitle/Description for accessibility (console warnings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features verified: 1) 'Editar Nombre' button in 'Funciones de Mesa' modal allows naming ANY account (not just split tables). The button is at Layout.js lines 814-819 and triggers openRenameAccountDialog event. 2) Comandas now include enhanced headers with area_name, account_display, account_label, waiter_name. This appears on comandas (kitchen/bar tickets) and pre-cuenta, but NOT on fiscal documents.
